text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew, time for a little break.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek is known for her stamina, so I'm
surprised she's out of breath from running laps.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the concern, but I'm just running a bit
hot thanks to this beautiful weather.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm glad you're worrying about me though! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh gosh, thank you! Hehe! I'm all energized now!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Please make sure you cheer your racer on just as
enthusiastically, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Goodness me, thank you! You're so considerate.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know! Have some of these in return! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Super Creek gives me some handmade cookies.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
They're my special carrot cookies. Go ahead and
have them during your break.
